title: LinkedIn SalesNav Company Scraper v3
description: Decodes a Sales Navigator URL and scrapes matching public company data using Typeahead API + Google fallback.

salesNavUrl.title: Sales Navigator Search URL
salesNavUrl.description: Full URL from your Sales Navigator company search.

keywordsOverride.title: Keywords override (optional)
keywordsOverride.description: Override keywords instead of using those from the URL.

maxSearchPages.title: Max HTML search pages to crawl
maxSearchPages.description: Only used by Strategy B (HTML fallback). Strategy A (Typeahead) handles pagination via keyword variants.

requestDelayMs.title: Base delay between requests (ms)
requestDelayMs.description: Increase to 10000-15000 if you hit auth walls. Lower = faster but riskier.

deepScrape.title: Deep scrape each company /about/ page
deepScrape.description: Fetches full data: website, specialties, founded year, description, etc.

enableGoogleFallback.title: Enable Google/Bing SERP fallback
enableGoogleFallback.description: If LinkedIn strategies yield < maxCompanies results, search Google for matching LinkedIn pages.

useApifyProxy.title: Use Apify Proxy
useApifyProxy.description: Highly recommended. Free tier = Datacenter proxies (moderate success). Paid = Residential (best).

proxyCountryCode.title: Proxy Country Code
proxyCountryCode.description: Match to your target region. IN=India, US=USA, GB=UK, SG=Singapore, DE=Germany, AU=Australia.
